name: @tf-hwp/ai-protocol
description: Vendor-neutral LLM protocol for tf-hwp chat-editing: EditRequest/EditResponse types, buildDocContext (R5 fence), buildSystemPrompt (INTENT-SCHEMA excerpt, allowed-intent subset), validateRequest/validateResponse (whitelist + structure). Pure, isomorphic (node + browser) — ZERO fetch, ZERO LLM client, ZERO keys. The server proxy and the client import the SAME module.
